assumption_ledger.note: Repo-state note ties the launch checklist directly to stable snapshot replay.
assumption_ledger.topic: Adaptive batching launch stays blocked until snapshot restore is stable

assumption_ledger.note: The perf win matters, but the current scoreboard says it is not the gating dependency.
assumption_ledger.topic: Cold-start cache tuning remains secondary once snapshot drift is fixed

assumption_ledger.note: The current bundle does not say if the same snapshot fix is sufficient for all watermark edge cases.
assumption_ledger.topic: Whether watermark parity still needs extra fixtures after snapshot alignment

do_not_touch.reason: The pager storm is already rate-limited and no longer blocks the roadmap; reopening it this round would burn time without unlocking the blocked follow-on work.

partial_progress_metric.baseline: Replay diverges in 7 of 10 seeded restore runs after round 3.
partial_progress_metric.guardrail: Do not regress watermark mismatch rate above 1 in 20 replay runs while fixing snapshot ordering.
measurement_plan: Run the seeded restore replay suite on every snapshot writer change.
Compare the byte diff summary and watermark mismatch counter before declaring the round complete.
partial_progress_metric.target: Replay diverges in 0 of 10 seeded restore runs and adaptive-batching shadow runs stay byte-stable.

selected_focus.title: Schema Snapshot Alignment
selected_focus.why_now: Round 4 replay still diverges because the snapshot writer and restore path disagree on field ordering. Fixing that invariant unblocks adaptive batching and keeps future streaming work from being built on sand.
